name: @clearline/data-access-expenses
description: Expenses data-access layer for clearline-web: React Query hooks over /api/expenses/* (context, my-expenses list, submit), surfacing the server's policy 422s as typed errors (US-CW-011). No UI, no business rules — those live in libs/ui and libs/domain/expenses respectively.

metadata.scope: Data-access lib for EPIC-CW-006 (US-CW-011 Expense Submission & Policy Enforcement).
